title: What did I miss
wikitext:
[]: What did I miss?             Quote Post by BossFight » Thu Mar 13, 2025 11:35 am I watched Evangelion (just the TV series + directors cut episodes) for the first time a few years ago. Because I was so late to the party I missed a lot of the analysis and speculation which would have been developed when the show first came out (for instance, I recently learned that the US fleet contains two Iowa class ships which where never finished IRL, indicating that WWII may have lasted longer in Eva compared to real life). So I was hoping the members of this forum could point out similar details I may have missed, annotated analysis of the show, or other such things.

[]: Re: What did I miss?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Mar 14, 2025 1:20 pm Well, the short (long?) answer is that this very forum is an archive of that kind of theory-crafting. It's not especially active but it's well-maintained with preserving that history in mind. The wiki itself is also a great hub, and makes for a more condensed reading, as it is, after all, a result of the discussion on the forum. Here are some pages that might interest you: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Category:Theory_and_Analysis And for funsies: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Radioactive_Waste I'd recommend watching End of Evangelion, and even Rebuild, beforehand, so as to avoid spoilers.

[]: Re: What did I miss?             Quote Post by Riptide » Sun Mar 16, 2025 10:55 am Axx°N N. wrote: Well, the short (long?) answer is that this very forum is an archive of that kind of theory-crafting. It's not especially active but it's well-maintained with preserving that history in mind. The wiki itself is also a great hub, and makes for a more condensed reading, as it is, after all, a result of the discussion on the forum. Here are some pages that might interest you: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Category:Theory_and_Analysis And for funsies: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Radioactive_Waste I'd recommend watching End of Evangelion, and even Rebuild, beforehand, so as to avoid spoilers.

[]: Re: What did I miss?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Mar 17, 2025 12:41 am Riptide wrote: Rebuild before EOE?

[]: Re: What did I miss?             Quote Post by WiseUp » Tue Mar 18, 2025 11:24 am You can find a lot of really good Eva video essays on YouTube. ProfessorViral has some really good in depth ones. Like the other commenter said, watched EoE and the Rebuilds (even though I frankly don't love those films) before going headfirst into theories. A lot of the stuff even in the OG series is later added onto by lore revealed in the rebuilds and especially EoE as that one is basically an extra 2 episodes.

Article: What did I miss
[]: What did I miss?             Quote Post by BossFight » Thu Mar 13, 2025 11:35 am I watched Evangelion (just the TV series + directors cut episodes) for the first time a few years ago. Because I was so late to the party I missed a lot of the analysis and speculation which would have been developed when the show first came out (for instance, I recently learned that the US fleet contains two Iowa class ships which where never finished IRL, indicating that WWII may have lasted longer in Eva compared to real life). So I was hoping the members of this forum could point out similar details I may have missed, annotated analysis of the show, or other such things.

The wiki itself is also a great hub, and makes for a more condensed reading, as it is, after all, a result of the discussion on the forum. Here are some pages that might interest you: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Category:Theory_and_Analysis And for funsies: https://wiki.evageeks.org/Radioactive_Waste I'd recommend watching End of Evangelion, and even Rebuild, beforehand, so as to avoid spoilers.
